introSection: Loup-Garou (French for "Werewolf") is a wooden roller coaster at Walibi Belgium in Wavre, Walloon Brabant, Wallonia, Belgium.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride received spare trains from Robin Hood at Walibi Belgium in 2024.

fullText:
Loup-Garou (French for "Werewolf") is a wooden roller coaster at Walibi Belgium in Wavre, Walloon Brabant, Wallonia, Belgium.

The ride received spare trains from Robin Hood at Walibi Belgium in 2024.
